personality: 1 iOS-Native Clean structure with 5 Brutalist starkness (monochrome + signal accent)
personality_one_liner: A stark, high-contrast B2B workspace that feels instantly premium and actionable, relying on crisp black typography and signal orange to guide focus without heavy UI chrome.

spacing.rule: Generous vertical breathing room for forms and reports. Tight grouping for stat cards to ensure scannability without clutter.

do's: Use glass on the sticky primary CTA container at the bottom of the Dashboard (+ New Business Audit).
Use glass on the bottom tab bar and sticky headers in the long-form Report and Proposal views.
Apply a white-tinted glass (light mode) or black-tinted (dark mode) under blur to guarantee readability.
dont's: Do not use glass on stat cards, list items, or script cards—keep them solid surfaceSecondary.

screens.name: Auth
screens.purpose: Secure entry point for agency owners, setting a premium tone.

states.error: Inline red validation text below inputs.

screens.layout: Hero image at the top taking up 35% of the screen. Clean, single-column input form below with labels above fields. A full-width solid brandPrimary button to Sign In.

screens.name: Dashboard
screens.purpose: At-a-glance B2B KPI overview with an immediate path to generating new audits.

states.loading: Skeleton blocks matching stat card shapes.
states.empty: Empty state illustration with 'Run your first audit to see stats'.

screens.layout: Grid of stat cards (2-col for smaller metrics, 1-col full width for Revenue/Win Rate) at the top. Below stats, a 'Recent Leads' snippet. A sticky glassmorphic container at the bottom containing the primary '+ New Business Audit' CTA.

screens.name: Leads List
screens.purpose: Track and access all prospected businesses and their status.

states.empty: Minimalist folder line-art graphic, 'No leads captured yet. Start an audit.'

screens.layout: Sticky header with horizontal scrolling filter chips (All, Hot, Pitched, Closed). Vertical list of leads. Each row has bold lead name, status tag (brandTertiary chip), and subtext (date/category). Swipe row to quick-action (Email/Call).

screens.name: New Business Audit Form
screens.purpose: Collect business input to generate the AI report.

states.loading: N/A (Submit button shows loading spinner when generating).
states.error: Form validation errors highlighted in red.

screens.layout: Multi-step form flow with a top progress indicator (e.g., Step 1 of 3). Single-column fields, labels above inputs. Native bottom sheet for category dropdown. Sticky 'Next' button at the bottom.

screens.name: AI Report View
screens.purpose: Display comprehensive AI-generated business insights in a structured, readable format.

states.loading: Shimmering text lines to simulate AI typing/generating.

screens.layout: Cover image of the business at the top with a dark gradient scrim and white text. Scrollable vertical layout with distinct sections (Summary, Google Maps, IG Audit). Use rich text formatting and 'cards' for 30 Reel Ideas. Sticky tab/header to jump to Sales Kit or Proposal.

screens.name: Sales Kit View
screens.layout: Segmented control or tab row at the top (Cold Call, IG DM, WhatsApp, etc.). Clean typography for the script body inside a surfaceSecondary card. A prominent 'Copy Script' icon button at the top right of each card.

screens.name: Proposal View
screens.purpose: Review and export the final pitch presentation.
screens.layout: Vertical scroll showing proposal sections (Cover, Audit, Timeline, Pricing). Pricing uses a distinct high-contrast card. A fixed glassmorphic bottom bar with a primary 'Export PDF/PPT' button.

auth_hero.alt: Abstract pattern of orange and cream shapes representing growth and networks

empty_leads.alt: Minimalist envelope or folder for empty states

report_cover_sample.alt: Modern minimal cafe exterior to serve as a sample business background

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette: White backgrounds, crisp black typography, and #FF6B00 orange exclusively for primary actions and accents. Avoid any blue, purple, or generic grey-blue hues.

Implement the Dashboard with progressive disclosure: place the most vital KPIs at the top left, keep the view clean (3-4 KPIs max per viewport line), and use a fixed bottom glass container for the '+ New Business Audit' CTA so it is always within thumb reach.
For the New Business Audit Form, implement a multi-step design (e.g., Step 1 of X) with labels directly above the input fields to reduce cognitive load and fit the modern Notion/Linear aesthetic.
Leads List must feature strong visual hierarchy: Lead name in weight 500, with status tags and dates underneath. Add swipe-to-action (email/call) to list rows.
In AI Report View, any cover image must have a top-to-bottom vertical linear gradient scrim (transparent to dark) over the bottom 50% to guarantee text readability.
Ensure all interactive stat cards and list rows have a slight touch feedback via Reanimated scale (e.g., press down to 0.97) and haptic response.
